response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ requirement, with directly relevant recent work in TypeScript/Node.js at Optilyz and current AI-agent/MCP tooling work at re:cinq that maps closely to the role. Strong polyglot background (TS, Java, D, C/C++, PHP), TDD/CI/CD discipline from RIDE Capital, and demonstrated ability to ship end-to-end across web, mobile, and embedded. Gaps: Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly listed, React experience is present but limited to one role, and cloud experience is narrow (AWS CDK only, no explicit GCP/Azure/Kubernetes-in-production depth beyond GISCollective).
strengths: 10+ years full-stack with recent TypeScript/Node.js + React production work and current AI-agent/MCP tooling experience
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, CI/CD, and testing-framework authorship (Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Polyglot across TS, Java, D, C/C++, PHP with backend, frontend, mobile, and DevOps (Docker, GitLab CI) breadth
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned in the resume; would need to confirm hands-on exposure
Cloud/containerization depth is thin — AWS CDK noted, but no clear Kubernetes-in-production or GCP/Azure signal beyond self-hosted GISCollective
Relational database experience (PostgreSQL) is not called out; primary DB experience is MongoDB and generic SQL/MySQL

key_factors.factor: Years of experience and polyglot breadth
Missing explicit Nest.js / Vitest / PostgreSQL signal
